data.title: Planet Evening News

Bitcoin plummets 5% after Chinese tariffs announcement. Global markets down, investor panic and $437 million in liquidations.

data.title: Argentinian Opposition Leaders Win Multiple Votes in the Lower House to Investigate President Milei, and LIBRA Token
data.description:
Argentinian lawmakers in the lower house dealt a blow to President Javier Milei, voting to create a commission to investigate his involvement with the LIBRA token.
source: https://zycrypto.com/argentinian-opposition-leaders-win-multiple-votes-in-the-lower-house-to-investigate-president-milei-and-libra-token/

data.title: U.S. Treasury Liquidity Release Supports Risk Assets Amid Stablecoin Growth
data.description:
According to PANews, an analysis by OKG Research reveals that as of April 8, 2025, the U.S. Treasury General Account (TGA) balance has decreased from $405.786 billion at the beginning of the month to $309.989 billion. This reduction has released $95.79 billion in liquidity, a rate 3.18 times faster than the same period in March. This action is perceived by the market as a form of 'invisible fiscal easing,' providing short-term support for risk assets.

On the blockchain front, since the beginning of 2024, the global stablecoin market has grown by 80.7%, surpassing $235 billion. Stablecoins are increasingly seen as simplified monetary tools within the shadow banking system, injecting liquidity into the crypto economy when issued.

The resonance between fiscal liquidity release and the issuance pace of on-chain dollars offers additional liquidity support in a constrained liquidity environment, driving short-term risk appetite recovery. Notably, from a monetary policy perspective, if the Federal Reserve maintains its current stance, the pace and space of fiscal liquidity release, along with the on-chain issuance of crypto liquidity, will become significant variables in the next wave of asset price fluctuations.

data.title: 21Shares files for the first US Spot Dogecoin ETF
data.description:
21Shares has officially filed with the SEC to launch the first-ever spot Dogecoin exchange-traded fund (ETF) in the United States.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/21shares-files-for-u-s-spot-dogecoin-etf/

data.title: Binance will launch BABY leverage, contracts and simple coin earning services
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will launch BABY's simple coin earning service at 11:00 (UTC) on April 10, 2025, and will add BABY/USDT and BABY/USDC leveraged trading pairs at 11:20 (UTC). In addition, BABYUSDT perpetual contract will be launched at 11:30 (UTC), with a maximum leverage of 5 times. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Binance Launches WalletConnect (WCT) on Launchpool: Farm WCT with BNB, FDUSD, and USDC Starting April 11
data.description: Binance has announced WalletConnect (WCT) as its 67th Launchpool project, with WCT farming starting on April 11, 2025, and trading live on April 15.Binance is rolling out a new Launchpool opportunity featuring WalletConnect (WCT) — a decentralized open-source protocol designed to connect users securely to Web3 decentralized applications (dApps). Users can farm WCT tokens by staking BNB, FDUSD, or USDC starting April 11 at 00:00 UTC.WCT will officially list on Binance on April 15 at 11:00 UTC, launching with WCT/USDT, WCT/USDC, WCT/BNB, WCT/FDUSD, and WCT/TRY trading pairs. The listing will include the Seed Tag, signaling a new and innovative asset.Key WalletConnect (WCT) Token Launch Details:Token Name: WalletConnect (WCT)Total Supply: 1,000,000,000 WCTInitial Circulating Supply: 186,200,000 WCT (18.62%)Launchpool Rewards: 40,000,000 WCT (4% of total supply)Smart Contract: OP Mainnet – 0xeF4461891DfB3AC8572cCf7C794664A8DD927945Listing Date: April 15, 2025, 11:00 UTCListing Fee: 0WCT Farming Schedule and Pool DistributionFarming Period: April 11, 2025, to April 14, 2025 (UTC)PoolTotal RewardsDaily RewardsBNB34,000,000 WCT (85%)8,500,000 WCTFDUSD2,000,000 WCT (5%)500,000 WCTUSDC4,000,000 WCT (10%)1,000,000 WCTHourly Hard Cap per User:BNB Pool: 35,416 WCTFDUSD Pool: 2,083 WCTUSDC Pool: 4,166 WCTHow to Participate in WalletConnect Launchpool:Visit Binance Launchpool (webpages will go live 12 hours before farming starts).Lock your BNB, FDUSD, or USDC in the corresponding pool.Earn WCT daily based on your share of the pool.

data.title: Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) launched projects CRYPTOAI and LeBarbie
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) launched Solana ecosystem's MEME token LeBarbie.
Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) aims to seamlessly connect CEX and DEX to provide users with a more convenient, efficient and secure on-chain trading experience. Users can directly use the spot account (USDT/USDC) in the Bitget App to trade popular assets on the chain. Currently, popular public chains such as Solana (SOL), BNB Smart Chain (BSC) and Base are supported.
